fault_hypothesis: The condition on line 72 uses `>` instead of `>=`, incorrectly allowing a new action when the number of active actions is exactly at the limit.

constraints.intent: The number of active actions should not be exactly at the limit, as this boundary condition is handled incorrectly.
If an action is allowed (i.e., this branch is taken), the number of prior actions must be strictly less than the limit.

spec.expr: all(ts >= cutoff__1 for ts in active__1)

constraints.intent: All timestamps considered active must be more recent than or equal to the cutoff time.
